---
LastModifyingUser: admin
Test
---
!| fixtures.AuthFixture |
| url | basicAuth | statusCodes? | responseBody? |
| !-http://192.168.4.187/trubi25v2rel/api/UsersAPI/AuthenticateUser-! | !-suraj:Sur$0402-! | 200 | |
| !-http://192.168.4.187/trubi25v2rel/api/UsersAPI/AuthenticateUser-! | !-suraj:Sur$040-! | 400 | |
| !-http://192.168.4.187/trubi25v2rel/api/UsersAPI/AuthenticateUser-! | !-:Sur$040-! | 400 | |
| !-http://192.168.4.187/trubi25v2rel/api/UsersAPI/AuthenticateUser-! | !-suraj:-! | 200 | |
